summary: Motivated DevOps Engineer with a strong focus on infrastructure reliability, scalability, and security. Experienced in designing and automating CI/CD pipelines, managing cloud environments on AWS, and implementing GitOps and Infrastructure-as-Code practices. Proven ability to reduce operational errors and deliver resilient platforms across hybrid and cloud-native environments.

experience.title: Senior DevOps Engineer
highlights: Automated software configuration and deployments using Amazon EKS, Helm, Argo CD, GitHub Actions, and Terraform, enabling GitOps workflows across multiple environments.
Worked with Huawei Cloud and AWS Outposts to support hybrid cloud deployments, bridging on-premises and cloud infrastructure.
Delivered resilient and scalable platforms through Infrastructure-as-Code (IaC) practices, reducing manual configuration and improving deployment consistency.
Collaborated with development teams to streamline release pipelines and enforce best practices in CI/CD automation.

experience.title: DevOps Engineer
highlights: Implemented customer integrations and system automation using Ansible, Jenkins, Docker, and Linux, improving deployment speed and reliability.
Built and maintained CI/CD pipelines that reduced operational errors and standardized the software delivery process.
Investigated and resolved production issues in containerized environments, minimizing downtime and service disruption.
Automated repetitive infrastructure tasks, freeing engineering capacity for higher-value work.

experience.title: Backend Engineer (PHP/Laravel)
highlights: Maintained and improved the company website, fixing bugs and ensuring uptime.
Refactored legacy code sections to improve maintainability and readability.
Optimized MySQL query performance, reducing page load times and improving application responsiveness.

certifications.name: AWS Certified Solutions Architect - Associate (SAA-C03)
certifications.issuer: Amazon Web Services Training and Certification

certifications.name: AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner (CLF-C02)
certifications.issuer: Amazon Web Services Training and Certification

items: AWS (EC2, EKS, S3, VPC, IAM, Outposts, CloudWatch, Lambda, SNS/SQS, API Gateway)
